name: Nanosonics Limited
analysis: NAN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 31% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.3100, stop A$3.0492, target A$3.7400 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
